_comment: Allowlist for skill metadata lint warnings. Each entry MUST list the skill name (without ck: prefix for ck:* skills) AND the specific rule IDs to silence AND a written reason. Available rule IDs include: use-this-prefix, maintainer-marker, todo-marker, too-short, too-long, missing-description, frontmatter-parse-error, missing-user-invocable-visibility, missing-skill-listing-budget, low-skill-listing-budget, missing-skill-description-cap, high-skill-description-cap. Keep this list small — prefer fixing metadata over allowlisting.
